title: A New Hobby
content: After spending too much time scrolling through social media every evening, Sophia decided she needed a healthier way to relax after work. One afternoon, she visited an art supply store and impulsively bought a beginner watercolor painting set. At first, her paintings looked messy and unbalanced, which frustrated her slightly. However, she gradually started enjoying the process itself rather than worrying about perfect results. Painting helped her slow down, focus, and disconnect from daily stress for a while. Over time, the hobby became an important part of her routine. Even simple paintings of flowers or city streets brought her a surprising sense of calm and satisfaction.
